raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year>, I had my XXXX and phone wallet case containing my Costco Credit Card by Citi and other things stolen such as my Social Security card by a group of at least four female robbers in their XXXX 's whilst shopping at XXXX  in XXXX, CA. I immediately informed the XXXX employees and right afterwards filed a police report in-person at the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX The police report number is XXXX and the two deputy 's last names are XXXX and XXXX XXXX I showed XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX {$430.00} charge the robbers had made on my Costco Credit Card by Citi when filing my police report in-person and later submitted a screen shot of it to them. The robbers also attempted a {$580.00} charge at XXXX XXXX in XXXX, CA while I was filing the police report on the same Costco Credit Card by Citi but I had already locked the card before they attempted the charge. The robbers also attempted to use a different credit card of mine that was in the phone wallet case they stole from XXXX  XXXX XXXX to place another {$430.00} XXXX charge but XXXX  XXXX XXXX flagged it as suspicious so the charge did not go through. I also placed a freeze with the three nationwide credit bureaus and placed an initial fraud alert on my XXXX credit report on XX/XX/year>. I disputed the {$430.00} XXXX charge that went through on my Costco Credit Card by Citi twice providing the police report number and the dispute was denied. I went to Citi in-person after the dispute was denied to try to get a refund for the charge but was told Citi wasn't the credit card company so they couldn't help me.
